lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਏ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sachai naam samaae har gun gaae mil preetam sukh paae |
lines.english: Merged in the True Name of the Lord, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord; meeting my Beloved, I have found peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਕਟੀਐ ਸਚੜੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bhram maaeaa vichahu katteeai sacharrai naam samaae |
lines.english: Doubt and Maya have been removed from within me, and I am merged in the Naam, the True Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦਿ ਰਹੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਹੰਉਮੈ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand rahai din raatee vichahu hnaumai jaae |
lines.english: I am in constant bliss, day and night; egotism has been dispelled from within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਪੁਰਖੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਹੰਉ ਲਾਗਉ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jinee purakhee har naam chit laaeaa tin kai hnau laagau paae |
lines.english: I fall at the feet of those who enshrine the Naam within their consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਂਇਆ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਤਾਂ ਥੀਐ ਜਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaaneaa kanchan taan theeai jaa satigur le milaae |2|
lines.english: The body becomes like gold, when the True Guru unites one with Himself. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਜੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦੇਇ ਬੁਝਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: so sachaa sach salaaheeai je satigur dee bujhaae |
lines.english: We truly praise the True Lord, when the True Guru imparts understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਣੀਆ ਕਿਆ ਮੁਹੁ ਦੇਸਨਿ ਆਗੈ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur bharam bhulaaneea kiaa muhu desan aagai jaae |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, they are deluded by doubt; going to the world hereafter, what face will they display?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੀਆ ਸੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਚਲੂਲਾ ਪਿਰ ਕੈ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: naam rateea se rang chaloolaa pir kai ank samaae |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Naam are dyed in the deep crimson color of the Lord's Love; they merge into the Being of their Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਦੇਨਿ ਮੁਹੁ ਜਾਏ ਅਵਗੁਣਿ ਪਛੁਤਾਏ ਦੁਖੋ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa den muhu jaae avagun pachhutaae dukho dukh kamaae |
lines.english: What face will they show, when they go there? They will regret and repent for their sins; their actions will bring them only pain and suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਜੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦੇਇ ਬੁਝਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: so sachaa sach salaaheeai je satigur dee bujhaae |3|
lines.english: We truly praise the True Lord, when the True Guru imparts understanding. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਸੂਝਈ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਕਹੀਐ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tis jevadd avar na soojhee kis aagai kaheeai jaae |
lines.english: I can conceive of no other as great as the Lord; unto whom should I go and speak?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸਚੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੇ ਤਿਨ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਮਲੁ ਸਭ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: se jan sache niramale tin miliaa mal sabh jaae |
lines.english: Those humble beings are true, and immaculately pure; meeting them, all filth is washed off.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਚੜਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹਿਆ ਹੰਉ ਤਿਨ ਲਾਗਉ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jinee sacharraa sach salaahiaa hnau tin laagau paae |
lines.english: I fall at the feet of those who praise the Truest of the True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਮਲੁ ਸਭ ਜਾਏ ਸਚੈ ਸਰਿ ਨਾਏ ਸਚੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tin miliaa mal sabh jaae sachai sar naae sachai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Meeting them, all filth is washed off; bathing in the Pool of Truth, one becomes truthful, with intuitive ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਬੁਝਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: naam niranjan agam agochar satigur deea bujhaae |
lines.english: The True Guru has given me the realization of the Naam, the Immaculate Name of the Lord, the unfathomable, the imperceptible.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: anadin bhagat kareh rang raate naanak sach samaae |
lines.english: Those who perform devotional worship to the Lord night and day, are imbued with His Love; O Nanak, they are absorbed in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਚੜਾ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਹੰਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਲਾਗਉ ਪਾਏ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: jinee sacharraa sach dhiaaeaa hnau tin kai laagau paae |4|4|
lines.english: I fall at the feet of those who meditate on the Truest of the True. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਲਲਾਂ ਬਹਲੀਮਾ ਕੀ ਧੁਨਿ ਗਾਵਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans kee vaar mahalaa 4 lalaan bahaleemaa kee dhun gaavanee |
lines.english: Vaar Of Wadahans, Fourth Mehl: To Be Sung In The Tune Of Lalaa-Behleemaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਵਡ ਹੰਸ ਹੈ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabad rate vadd hans hai sach naam ur dhaar |
lines.english: The great swans are imbued with the Word of the Shabad; they enshrine the True Name within their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹਹਿ ਸਦ ਸਚਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sach sangraheh sad sach raheh sachai naam piaar |
lines.english: They gather Truth, remain always in Truth, and love the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਲਗਈ ਨਦਰਿ ਕੀਤੀ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa niramal mail na lagee nadar keetee karataar |
lines.english: They are always pure and immaculate - filth does not touch them; they are blessed with the Grace of the Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਜੋ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਪਹਿ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak hau tin kai balihaaranai jo anadin japeh muraar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, I am a sacrifice to those who, night and day, meditate on the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਜਾਨਿਆ ਵਡ ਹੰਸੁ ਹੈ ਤਾ ਮੈ ਕੀਆ ਸੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: mai jaaniaa vadd hans hai taa mai keea sang |
lines.english: I thought that he was a great swan, so I associated with him.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੰਸਾ ਵੇਖਿ ਤਰੰਦਿਆ ਬਗਾਂ ਭਿ ਆਯਾ ਚਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hansaa vekh tarandiaa bagaan bhi aayaa chaau |
lines.english: Seeing the swans swimming, the herons became envious.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਜਾਣਾ ਬਗੁ ਬਪੁੜਾ ਤ ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਦੇਦੀ ਅੰਗੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: je jaanaa bag bapurraa ta janam na dedee ang |2|
lines.english: If I had known that he was only a wretched heron from birth, I would not have touched him. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੁਬਿ ਮੁਏ ਬਗ ਬਪੁੜੇ ਸਿਰੁ ਤਲਿ ਉਪਰਿ ਪਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ddub mue bag bapurre sir tal upar paau |3|
lines.english: But the poor herons drowned and died, and floated with their heads down, and their feet above. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਆਪਿ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਆਪਿ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: too aape hee aap aap hai aap kaaran keea |
lines.english: You Yourself are Yourself, all by Yourself; You Yourself created the creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਹੈ ਤੂ ਕਰਹਿ ਸੁ ਥੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: too karan kaaran samarath hai too kareh su theea |
lines.english: You are the all-powerful Cause of causes; what You do, comes to be.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਕੋ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਬੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: too aape aap nirankaar hai ko avar na beea |
lines.english: You Yourself are Yourself the Formless Lord; there is no other than You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਅਣਮੰਗਿਆ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਵਣਾ ਸਭਨਾਹਾ ਜੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: too anamangiaa daan devanaa sabhanaahaa jeea |
lines.english: You give gifts to all beings, without their asking.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਆਖਹੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਵਾਹੁ ਵਾਹੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਦਾਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਦੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh aakhahu satigur vaahu vaahu jin daan har naam mukh deea |1|
lines.english: Everyone proclaims, "Waaho! Waaho!" Blessed, blessed is the True Guru, who has given the supreme gift of the Name of the Lord. ||1||
